title: Mr. President
description: "The most TREMENDOUS plugin EVER created!" Mr. President transforms your server into an intense comedic dystopia where an AI-powered dictator issues ridiculous orders, launches missiles at disobedient players and treats everyone like the peasants they are.
body:
# 🚀 Mr. President - An AI Fascist With Missiles! 🚀
![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/version-1.1.5-red.svg) ![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/minecraft-1.20.0+-green.svg) ![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-TOTALITARIAN-purple.svg) > *"I, and I alone, am going to Make Minecraft Great Again!"* - Mr. President ### Transform your peaceful server into a hilarious authoritarian nightmare!
![Mr. President Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e117f71ffe5039c3aa88328ee31efc034b425c91.jpeg) --- ## 🆕 What's New in v1.1.5? ### Major Improvements: - 🎯 **Fixed Strategic Bombing** - Structures now generate enough blocks to complete missions - 📦 **Smarter Item Requests** - No more asking for diamonds/emeralds, only common items - 👹 **Balanced Nether Mobs** - Max 5 kills for nether mobs (was up to 25!) - 💥 **2x Default Missile Power** - Because democracy needs more explosions - 📋 **Cleaned Config File** - 60% smaller, 100% more useful with actual descriptions - 🔧 **Standing System Fix** - No more duplicate reputation messages [See full changelog](CHANGELOG-1.1.5.md) for all 40+ improvements! --- ## 🎭 What is Mr. President? Welcome to the most **TREMENDOUS** Minecraft plugin ever created! Mr. President transforms your server into a comedic dystopia where an AI-powered dictator issues ridiculous orders, launches missiles at disobedient players, and treats everyone like the worthless tax-paying peasants they truly are. This isn't just a plugin - it's a **REGIME CHANGE**. ### 🎯 Perfect For: - ✅ **Established servers** looking for fresh chaos - ✅ **Event servers** wanting unique gameplay - ✅ **Comedy servers** embracing dark humor - ✅ **Streamers** seeking entertaining content - ✅ **Anyone** who thinks Minecraft needs more missiles --- ## ⚡ Quick Start (30 Seconds to Tyranny!) **For best experience, use Paper 1.20 or newer.** ### 🏃 Speed Run Installation 1. **Drop the JAR** → Place `mr-president-plugin-1.1.5.jar` in `/plugins` 2. **Add API Key** → Edit `config.yml` with your OpenAI key 3. **Restart Server** → Let the regime begin! 4. **First Order** → Watch players scramble to obey! ### 🎮 Essential Commands for Survival | Command | Description | Survival Rating | |---------|-------------|-----------------| | `/myprogress` | Check current order status | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | | `/reputation` | View your standing with the regime | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | | `/offer` | Attempt to bribe Mr. President | ⭐⭐⭐ | | `/negotiate ` | Plead for mercy | ⭐⭐ | | `/surrender` | Give up (missiles incoming!) | ⭐ | ### 💀 First Day Survival Checklist - [ ] Complete your first order (or die trying) - [ ] Check reputation (prepare for disappointment) - [ ] Witness first missile strike (from safe distance) - [ ] Try bribing with diamonds (50% success rate) - [ ] Accept your new overlord (100% success rate) ### 🖥️ Democracy Manager GUI Panel Access the Democracy Manager with `/dm` - a fully interactive GUI that puts all controls at your fingertips: **Player Features:** - 📊 **Live Statistics Dashboard** - Track your reputation, orders completed/failed, missiles survived - 📨 **Direct Messaging** - Send messages directly to Mr. President (responses not guaranteed) - 💰 **Negotiation Interface** - Attempt to negotiate with visual success chance indicators - 🗺️ **Navigation Toggle** - Enable/disable waypoint navigation for orders - 📍 **Order Progress Tracker** - Real-time progress on current presidential orders **Admin Control Center:** - 🎯 **Order Management** - Force start/stop/complete orders with custom selection - 🚀 **Missile Command** - Launch any missile type at any player with one click - 💥 **Missile Power Control** - Adjust destruction level (1x Less Powerful, 2x Normal, 3x Extremely Powerful) - ⏰ **Order Timing Control** - Set order intervals (Back to Back, Standard, Longer delays) - 📈 **Reputation Editor** - Adjust any player's reputation instantly - 🌡️ **Heatmap Viewer** - See player activity hotspots for targeting - 🤖 **AI Controls** - Manage AI responses and behavior - 🔄 **Quick Reload** - Reload configuration without commands --- ## 🎪 Core Features That Will Ruin Your Server (In a Good Way) ### 🤖 **AI-Powered Dictator Brain** - **Dynamic Personality**: Powered by OpenAI for unique, contextual responses - **Memory System**: Remembers players and holds grudges accordingly - **250+ Insults**: From "peasant" to "statistical anomaly #48291" - **Personalized IDs**: "Credit Score: 350" or "Audit Target #45892" ### 📜 **14 Types of Presidential Orders**
Click to View All Order Types (Each More Ridiculous Than the Last) 1. **Resource "Donation"** - *"Your items belong to the state now!"* Voluntary contributions of diamonds, gold, or whatever Mr. President's yacht fund needs today. Failure to donate is considered tax evasion. 2. **Intelligence Test** - *"Prove you're smarter than a villager!"* Answer ridiculous riddles like "What has two legs and disappoints me?" (Spoiler: It's you). Wrong answers trigger immediate missile response. 3. **Demolition Duty** - *"Progress requires destruction!"* Tear down that ugly house you spent hours building because it's blocking the view from Mr. President's future golf course. 4. **Wildlife Recruitment** - *"The state needs a zoo!"* Capture innocent animals and deliver them to designated "re-education camps." Chickens are considered political dissidents. 5. **Diplomatic Courier** - *"Urgent documents need delivery!"* Sprint 5000+ blocks to deliver "classified" items (usually just rotten flesh) to ambassadors who definitely aren't just trapped villagers. 6. **Strategic Bombing** - *"Urban planning at its finest!"* Place TNT in specific patterns that spell out propaganda messages. Don't worry about the neighbors - they're probably enemies of the state anyway. 7. **Threat Elimination** - *"National security is at stake!"* Hunt dangerous mobs that are clearly plotting against the regime. That creeper? Obviously a terrorist. That skeleton? Armed insurgent. 8. **Population Control** - *"Too many zombies dilute our democracy!"* Reduce specific mob populations because Mr. President read somewhere that zombie-to-player ratios affect the economy. 9. **Protest Suppression** - *"Iron golems are organizing!"* These metal menaces are clearly union organizers spreading dangerous ideas about "worker's rights" and "not being murdered." Eliminate with extreme prejudice. 10. **Social Cleansing** - *"Zombies don't contribute to GDP!"* Remove these "unproductive elements" from society. They don't pay taxes, they smell bad, and they lower property values in nice neighborhoods. 11. **Monument Construction** - *"Build my glory in obsidian!"* Construct massive propaganda structures featuring Mr. President's face. Must be visible from space. Materials not provided - that's your problem, peasant. 12. **Tax Collection** - *"Revenue enhancement initiative!"* Gather "voluntary" contributions from fellow players. If they refuse, report them for immediate missile audit. The IRS wishes it had our efficiency. 13. **Loyalty Demonstration** - *"Dance, monkey, dance!"* Perform humiliating tasks like jumping in place for 5 minutes, swimming in lava (briefly), or writing "I LOVE MR. PRESIDENT" in diamond blocks. 14. **Emergency Conscription** - *"Your country needs you NOW!"* Immediate deployment to whatever insane task Mr. President dreamed up during his 3am Twitter session. Usually involves TNT, lava, and poor life choices.
### 💥 **The Presidential Missile Arsenal** | Missile Type | Damage | Crater Size | Warning Time | Survival Chance | |--------------|--------|-------------|--------------|-----------------| | **Warning Shot** | Low | 3 blocks | 10 seconds | 80% | | **Standard** | Fatal | 5 blocks | 8 seconds | 40% | | **Cluster Bomb** | Fatal×5 | 8 blocks | 6 seconds | 15% | | **Bunker Buster** | Fatal | 15 deep | 5 seconds | 5% | | **Nuclear Option** | Apocalyptic | 25 radius | 3 seconds | Prayer | ### 📊 **Reputation System** ``` 🟢 Loyal Citizen (+100+) → Slightly fewer missiles 🟡 Good Standing (+50-99) → Still getting missiles ⚪ Neutral (-49-49) → Walking on thin ice 🟠 Suspicious (-50-99) → Under surveillance 🔴 Enemy of State (-100+) → Name on every missile ``` ### 🏛️ **Political Infrastructure** - **Presidential Monument**: Massive obsidian structure (spawns automatically) - **Propaganda Towers**: Broadcasting "wisdom" 24/7 - **Protected Embassies**: Attack ambassadors at your own peril - **State Surveillance**: Big Brother is always watching ### 🎮 **Interactive GUI System** **Democracy Manager (`/dm`) - Your One-Stop Oppression Shop:**
🖱️ Click to See All GUI Features **PLAYER INFORMATION ROW** - **Player Profile** - Your degrading citizen ID, reputation standing, complete stats - Real-time tracking of all your failures and occasional successes **STATUS & STATISTICS ROW** - **Reputation Display** - Visual representation with color-coded standing - **Active Order Panel** - Current order with time remaining, glows when urgent - **Server Overview** - Global statistics, population data, threat levels **COMMUNICATION CENTER** - **Message President** - Type messages directly through GUI interface - **Negotiate Button** - Shows success chance percentage before you try - **Discord Status** - Integration status with webhook testing **PLAYER ACTIONS** - **Order Details** - Comprehensive breakdown of current order requirements - **Navigation Toggle** - Enable/disable waypoint beacons - **Help Wiki** - Access to survival guides and tips **ADMIN CONTROL PANEL** (Admin Only) - **Order Management** - Opens sub-GUI with all 14 order types to force-start - **Missile Arsenal** - Opens missile selection GUI with all types - **Reputation Control** - Instant reputation adjustment interface - **Configuration Reload** - Apply config changes without restart **ADVANCED ADMIN TOOLS** - **Heatmap Visualizer** - See where players spend time for targeting - **AI Behavior Controls** - Adjust AI personality and response settings - **Server Status Monitor** - Real-time performance metrics - **Bunker Buster Testing** - Test explosion mechanics safely
**Missile Selection GUI Features:** - Visual missile catalog with damage preview - Player targeting with dropdown selection - Coordinate targeting for precise strikes - Warning time customization - Launch confirmation to prevent accidents **Order Management GUI Features:** - Browse all 14 order types with descriptions - Preview order requirements before starting - Emergency stop/complete buttons - Order history viewer - Custom duration settings --- ## 🛠️ Full Installation & Configuration ### System Requirements - **Minecraft**: 1.20.0 or higher - **Server**: Paper/Spigot/Bukkit - **Java**: 21 or higher - **OpenAI API**: Required for AI features ### Detailed Setup
📋 Step-by-Step Installation 1. Download `mr-president-plugin-1.1.0.jar` 2. Place in server's `/plugins` folder 3. Start server to generate config files 4. Stop server and edit `config.yml` 5. Add your OpenAI API key: ```yaml openai: api-key: "your-openai-api-key-here" ``` 6. Configure to taste (see below) 7. Restart server 8. Embrace authoritarianism!
⚙️ Configuration Options **The config.yml has been completely overhauled in v1.1.5!** - ✨ Removed all non-functional parameters - 📝 Added detailed descriptions for every setting - 🎯 Only includes settings that actually work - 💡 Clear warnings for dangerous options ```yaml # Essential Configuration (config.yml) openai: api-key: "your-openai-api-key-here" # REQUIRED! model: "gpt-4o-mini" # Recommended max-tokens: 150 # Keep it snappy orders: enabled: true # Use new order system min-delay-minutes: 5 # Time between orders default-duration-minutes: 15 # Time to complete failure-reputation: 20 # Penalty for failure # Admin controls for missiles and timing are now # in the Democracy Manager GUI (/dm) - much easier! # See full config.yml for all options with descriptions ```
--- ## 🎯 How to Survive (And Maybe Thrive) ### 📖 Player Survival Guide
🏃 Emergency Protocols **"I'm about to be missiled!"** - Run in zigzags (10% evasion bonus) - Get underground FAST - Offer your best items via `/offer` - Accept your fate with dignity **"I can't complete this order!"** - Check `/myprogress` for specifics - Ask other players for help - Use `/negotiate` to grovel - Prepare bunker for incoming missiles **"My reputation is -100!"** - You're now an Enemy of the State - Every missile has your name on it - Consider witness protection - Or embrace the chaos!
### 💡 Pro Tips from Survivors 1. **Resource Management** - Keep diamonds/emeralds for emergency bribes - Store valuable items in hidden chests - Trade with others to complete orders faster 2. **Base Building** - Build deep underground (bunker busters aside) - Multiple exits for missile evasion - Decoy houses to confuse targeting 3. **Social Strategy** - Form alliances to complete group orders - Share resources during emergencies - Never trust anyone completely --- ## 🎨 Special Features & Easter Eggs ### 🎭 Dynamic AI Interactions - Remembers past interactions and holds grudges - Adapts insults based on player behavior - Creates unique degrading titles for each player - Context-aware threats and false promises ### 🌍 Environmental Storytelling - Mysterious monument appearances - Regular propaganda broadcasts - "Democratic" elections (results predetermined) - Surveillance reminders in chat ### 😂 Comedy Gold Elements - Absurd order justifications - Over-the-top political rhetoric - Dramatic missile launch sequences - Bureaucratic ID number assignments --- ## 📊 Admin Control Panel
🔧 Administrative Commands & GUI Access ### 🖥️ GUI-Based Administration Access the complete admin interface with `/dm` (requires admin permission): **Visual Admin Controls:** - 📋 **Order Management GUI** - Browse and start any order type - 🚀 **Missile Selection GUI** - Visual missile launcher with targeting - 📊 **Live Statistics** - Real-time server metrics and player data - 🎯 **Point & Click Controls** - No commands needed for most actions ### 💻 Traditional Commands | Command | Description | GUI Alternative | |---------|-------------|----------------| | `/mrpresident reload` | Reload configuration | ✅ GUI Button | | `/mrpresident force-order ` | Trigger specific order | ✅ Order GUI | | `/mrpresident set-reputation ` | Adjust reputation | ✅ Rep Control | | `/mrpresident spawn-missile ` | Manual strike | ✅ Missile GUI | | `/mrpresident monument ` | Manage monument | ❌ Command only | | `/mrpresident skip-order` | Skip current order | ✅ Order GUI | | `/mrpresident pause\|resume` | Control regime | ❌ Command only |
--- ## ⚡ Performance & Compatibility ### 🚀 Optimized for Chaos - **Lightweight**: Minimal server impact - **Asynchronous**: AI calls don't cause lag - **Configurable**: Every aspect customizable - **Safe**: No permanent world damage - **Compatible**: Works with most plugins ### 🛡️ Safety Features - Rollback commands for accidents - Protected spawn areas (configurable) - Missile damage caps - Anti-grief protections --- ## 📖 Version History
📜 Changelog **v1.1.0 - The Oppression Update** - Added 250+ new derogatory terms - Enhanced AI creativity and responses - Implemented ambassador protection - All missiles now deal proper damage - Bunker busters create deep craters - Fixed bugs allowing too much freedom **v1.0.0 - Initial Tyranny** - First release of the regime - Basic missile system - 10 order types - Simple reputation tracking
--- ## ⚠️ Warnings & Disclaimers > **CONTENT WARNING**: This plugin contains dark political satire and authoritarian themes played for comedy. No actual democracies were harmed in the making of this plugin. ### Side Effects May Include: - 📉 Decreased server population - 💥 Increased missile strikes - 🗳️ Irresistible urge to vote (pointlessly) - 😰 Existential dread about democracy - 🎮 Uncontrollable laughter ---
## 🚀 Ready to Ruin Your Server? ### [⬇️ Download Mr. President & Exclusives @ Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/wonderfullyevil) *"Make Your Server Great Again... Or Else!"* **Transform your boring democracy into a TREMENDOUS dictatorship today!** --- Mr. President Plugin © 2024 | Not responsible for server uprisings | Please dictate responsibly
